txt:
MAXI • ADULT
                                                        WITH CHICKEN AND RICE
                                     GEMON MAXI ADULT WITH CHICKEN AND RICE is a complete pet food for large-size adult
                                     dogs. The formulation is characterised by topquality ingredients like chicken, a source
                                     of essential nutrients, and rice, a source of carbohydrates. The recipe is made highly
                                     digestible thanks to the extrusion process. A balanced diet with prebiotics, such as
                                     fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), and beet pulp, source of insoluble fibres to support the
                                     regular functioning of the intestinal tract. It contains fresh meat for optimal palata-
                                     bility and glucosamine and chondroitin sulphate for joints and bone support. It also
                                     contains yucca schidigera to limit intestinal odors and brewer’s yeast for bushy coat.
                                     No added artificial dyes and preservatives.


                                     COMPOSITION: Cereals (rice 5%), meat and animal derivatives 22% (fresh chicken meat 10%, chondroitin
                                     sulphate 0.04%), oils and fats, derivatives of vegetable origin (beet pulp 2%, fructo-oligosaccharides
                                     FOS 1% and yucca schidigera 0.1%), yeasts (brewer’s yeast 1%), minerals, molluscs and crustaceans
                                     (glucosamine 0.057%). ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Crude Protein: 24%, Crude Fibre: 2.5%, Crude Fat:
                                     12%, Crude Ash: 6.8%, Calcium: 1.6%, Phosphorus 1.1%. Metabolized Energy: 3,828 kcal/kg. ADDITIVES:
                                     NUTRITIONAL ADDITIVES/kg: Vitamin A (Retinyl Acetate) 24,600 IU, Vitamin D3 1,290 IU, Vitamin E (all-rac-
                                     alpha-tocopheryl acetate) 58 mg, Choline chloride 1,000 mg, Selenium (Sodium selenite 0.33 mg) 0.15
               Pack size:            mg, Manganese (manganous sulphate monohydrate 69mg) 22.5mg, Zinc (Zinc oxide 130 mg) 105 mg,
                 15kg                Copper (Copper (II) sulphate pentahydrate 35 mg) 9 mg, Iron (Iron (II) sulphate monohydrate 228mg) 75
                                     mg, Iodine (Calcium iodate anhydrous 1.8mg) 1.2 mg. TECHNOLOGICAL ADDITIVES: Antioxidants. SENSORY
                                     ADDITIVES: Chestnut extract 20 mg/kg. INSTRUCTIONS FOR USE: Recommended daily feeding intakes
                                     (see table) may be split into 2 daily meals. Individual nutritional requirements may vary due to size, age
                                     and activity level of the animal. Fresh and clean water should be available at all times. When this product
        COMPLETE PET FOOD
                                     replaces another type of feed and/or diet it is recommended to introduce it gradually over a period of at
     FOR ADULT MAXI-SIZE DOGS        least 1 week. Dog food only, not suitable for human consumption.




Recommended daily feeding intakes (grams/day)
Weight of adult dog (in kg)                       32          35          40          45          50           60          70          80
Silhouette thin
